'''Sith officers''' were former [[Republic officer/Legends|Republic officers]] that joined the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]] when [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] and [[Darth Malak]] turned on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] after the [[Battle of Malachor V]].

==Description==
Sith Officer uniforms may vary in [[Color/Legends|color]] from light to dark gray, dark gray-green, or black. Generally, a strap connected from a left shoulder epaulet running cross diagonal to a utility belt. Boots and caps usually matched the color scheme of the torso, but may also vary as well. Sometimes, they also wore on their left breast a plate with various colored lines on it.

==History==
Many, if not all of these officers served in the [[Mandalorian Wars]] under Revan and Malak. As many [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Officers were the commanders of Republic ships such as the [[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|''Leviathan'']] and the [[Ravager (Centurion-class)|''Ravager'']] during the Mandalorian Wars, they took these ships with them when they turned their backs on the Republic. Many of these officers, especially [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Saul Karath]] who destroyed an entire planet ([[Telos IV]]), changed so quickly into ruthless monsters suggesting that the dark side of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] affected them as it had affected Revan and Malak.
